query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') as data, COUNT(*) as total FROM arquivos WHERE status = 'processado' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') as data, COUNT(*) as total FROM arquivos WHERE status = 'processado' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 10;
